description: Server performance data from SCOM Data Warehouse. Shows CPU, memory, disk, and network metrics collected by SCOM agents. Select a server to drill into specific host performance.

options.content: Server performance data from SCOM Data Warehouse. Shows CPU, memory, disk, and network metrics collected by SCOM agents. Select a server to drill into specific host performance.

panels.title: CPU Utilization
panels.description: Latest average CPU utilization from SCOM performance data.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "CPU %"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'Processor' AND pri.CounterName = '% Processor Time' AND pri.InstanceName = '_Total'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC
targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "CPU %"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'Processor' AND pri.CounterName = '% Processor Time' AND pri.InstanceName = '_Total'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Memory Available
panels.description: Latest available memory in MB from SCOM performance data.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Available MB"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'Memory' AND pri.CounterName = 'Available MBytes'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC
targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Available MB"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'Memory' AND pri.CounterName = 'Available MBytes'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Worst Disk Free
panels.description: Lowest disk free space percentage across all logical disks.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Free %"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk' AND pri.CounterName = '% Free Space'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.AverageValue ASC
targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Free %"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk' AND pri.CounterName = '% Free Space'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.AverageValue ASC

panels.title: Processor Queue
panels.description: Latest processor queue length indicating CPU saturation.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Queue Length"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'System' AND pri.CounterName = 'Processor Queue Length'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC
targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Queue Length"
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'System' AND pri.CounterName = 'Processor Queue Length'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: CPU & Memory Over Time
panels.description: CPU utilization and committed memory percentage trends from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE (
  (pri.ObjectName = 'Processor' AND pri.CounterName = '% Processor Time' AND pri.InstanceName = '_Total')
  OR (pri.ObjectName = 'Memory' AND pri.CounterName = '% Committed Bytes In Use')
)
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime
targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE (
  (pri.ObjectName = 'Processor' AND pri.CounterName = '% Processor Time' AND pri.InstanceName = '_Total')
  OR (pri.ObjectName = 'Memory' AND pri.CounterName = '% Committed Bytes In Use')
)
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Disk Free Space Over Time
panels.description: Free space percentage per logical disk over time from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.InstanceName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk' AND pri.CounterName = '% Free Space'
AND pri.InstanceName NOT IN ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime
targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.InstanceName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk' AND pri.CounterName = '% Free Space'
AND pri.InstanceName NOT IN ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Disk Latency
panels.description: Read and write latency per logical disk in milliseconds from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.InstanceName + ' ' + pri.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue * 1000 AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk'
AND pri.CounterName IN ('Avg. Disk sec/Read', 'Avg. Disk sec/Write')
AND pri.InstanceName NOT IN ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime
targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.InstanceName + ' ' + pri.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue * 1000 AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk'
AND pri.CounterName IN ('Avg. Disk sec/Read', 'Avg. Disk sec/Write')
AND pri.InstanceName NOT IN ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server')
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Network Throughput
panels.description: Network bytes total per second per interface from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.InstanceName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pri.ObjectName = 'Network Interface' AND pri.CounterName = 'Bytes Total/sec'
AND (me.Path LIKE '$server' AND me.ManagedEntityRowId IN (SELECT r.TargetManagedEntityRowId FROM vRelationship r INNER JOIN vManagedEntity gme ON r.SourceManagedEntityRowId = gme.ManagedEntityRowId WHERE gme.DisplayName LIKE '$site_group'))
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId

AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)

query.query: SELECT DISTINCT me.DisplayName AS __text, me.DisplayName AS __value FROM vManagedEntity me INNER JOIN vManagedEntityType met ON me.ManagedEntityTypeRowId = met.ManagedEntityTypeRowId WHERE met.ManagedEntityTypeSystemName = 'System.Group' AND me.DisplayName LIKE '%Servers%' ORDER BY me.DisplayName
SELECT DISTINCT me.Path AS __text, me.Path AS __value FROM vManagedEntity me WHERE me.ManagedEntityTypeRowId = 2 ORDER BY me.Path

title: SCOM Server Overview
